description_long: This object is a bottle of Aveeno lotion with a pump dispenser, featuring a beige plastic body and a blue pump top. The front label displays the Aveeno brand and product information, with blue and white text and a subtle oat graphic. The bottle is slightly curved with ergonomic indentations on the sides for easy gripping. The pump mechanism is prominent at the top, designed for dispensing lotion with a press. The bottle is surrounded by light blue 3D text reading 'Sara' and 'C02', which appears decorative and not part of the lotion packaging. The overall appearance is clean and typical of personal care products found in urban environments.
description: A beige Aveeno lotion bottle with a blue pump dispenser and a front label featuring blue and white text, surrounded by decorative blue 3D text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Aveeno label, blue pump, and decorative blue 3D text 'Sara' and 'C02' above and below the bottle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's curved profile and the pump's side, with the label mostly hidden and the blue 3D text aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bottle and label, with the blue 3D text mirrored and the pump visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's side and pump, with the blue 3D text stacked vertically and the label not visible.
